title: fragaria vesca var. monophylla
intro: Fragaria vesca var. monophylla, also known as the single-leaf wild strawberry, is a rare variety of the wild strawberry plant that is native to certain regions of North America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. monophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve heart health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
